login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in and get your matchday predictions ready.

metadata.title: Recover password — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: Request a link to recover access to Quiniela FUTVE.

forgotPassword.title: Recover your access
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to get back in the match.

metadata.title: Check your email — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: We sent you a link to reset your password.

forgotPasswordSent.title: Check your email
forgotPasswordSent.subtitle: We sent you a link to reset your password. Open it from your inbox and get back to setting up your predictions.
forgotPasswordSent.note: If it does not show up in a few minutes, check spam or promotions. Sometimes the perfect pass takes a moment to arrive.

metadata.title: Create account — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: Create a free account to play Liga FUTVE pools.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join for free and start competing with your friends.
register.passwordTitle: Use at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and one number.
register.terms: By signing up, you accept the

metadata.title: Verify your email — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: Confirm your email to activate your Quiniela FUTVE account.

verifyEmail.title: You're on the squad list!
verifyEmail.subtitle: Thanks for signing up. We sent you an email to verify your account. Click the link and you'll be ready to enter the platform.
verifyEmail.note: The link can take a few minutes to arrive. Check spam or promotions if you do not see it in your main inbox.
